}$00,$03,$03,$00,$00,$00,$01,$01,$01,$01,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{

'Sprites24_Link Colors
Sprites24_LinkColors long {
}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{   'index=0x0
}%11111111_10111000_11111000_00011000,{   'index=0x1
}%11111111_11100100_01011100_00010000,{   'index=0x2
}%11111111_11111111_10100000_01000100,{   'index=0x3
}%11111111_00000000_00000000_10111100,{   'index=0x4
}%11111111_11111100_11111100_11111100,{   'index=0x5
}%11111111_10111111_11111111_11111111,{   'index=0x6
}%11111111_11100000_10011110_00101010,{   'index=0x7
}%11111111_10010110_01001010_00001101,{   'index=0x8
}%11111111_10001110_11011010_00000000,{   'index=0x9
}%11111111_10110101_00110001_00100001,{   'index=0xa
}%11111111_11111111_11111111_11111111,{   'index=0xb
}%11111111_11100111_10011100_00100001,{   'index=0xc
}%11111111_01101000_10001000_11111111   'index=0xd
